case_title: JASON ALLEN TOBIN VS. EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: PRENTICE - HALL CORPORATION SYSTEM) SERVED NOV-29-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISIONER FILED BY TOBIN, JASON ALLEN EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOBIN, JASON ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN 506. PLAINTIFF JASON ALLEN TOBIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NADIA REYNAGA-MORENO, LEGAL SUPPORT LEAD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TOBIN, JASON ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOBIN, JASON ALLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
